name_cn:
NÉONOÉ Medium Handbag #️⃣M44020
Exclusive global launch of authentic boutique version! This item is custom-made according to boutique French production processes, with dynamic chip code changing. Original boutique fabric, original boutique light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic).
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% restoration of authentic feel! Exclusive authentic original fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, latest official website gift box!
26 x 26 x 17.5 cm
(L x H x W)
Monogram Coated Canvas
Calfskin Trim
Microfiber Lining
Metal Hardware
Drawstring
Metal Grommets
Compartment
Center Zip Pocket
Strap: Removable, Adjustable
Strap Half Length: 33.0 cm
Strap Half Length Adjustable To: 56.0 cm
Made in France
